testcase.name: test_admin_sees_conditional_product

failure.message: AssertionError: Admin should see conditional product d2cb29df-46ce-430d-9cb6-3f1d27db2f53 in products-all assert 'd2cb29df-46ce-430d-9cb6-3f1d27db2f53' in ['prod_zoho_one_express', 'prod_zoho_books_express', 'prod_zoho_crm_express', 'prod_zoho_expense_setup', 'prod_zoho_people_setup', 'prod_health_check_starter', ...]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter122_product_conditional_visibility.py:168: in test_admin_sees_conditional_product assert pid in product_ids, f"Admin should see conditional product {pid} in products-all" E AssertionError: Admin should see conditional product d2cb29df-46ce-430d-9cb6-3f1d27db2f53 in products-all E assert 'd2cb29df-46ce-430d-9cb6-3f1d27db2f53' in ['prod_zoho_one_express', 'prod_zoho_books_express', 'prod_zoho_crm_express', 'prod_zoho_expense_setup', 'prod_zoho_people_setup', 'prod_health_check_starter', ...]

testcase.name: test_update_product_visibility_conditions_multi_condition

failure.message: AssertionError: Product d2cb29df-46ce-430d-9cb6-3f1d27db2f53 not found after update assert None is not None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter122_product_conditional_visibility.py:200: in test_update_product_visibility_conditions_multi_condition assert product is not None, f"Product {pid} not found after update" E AssertionError: Product d2cb29df-46ce-430d-9cb6-3f1d27db2f53 not found after update E assert None is not None
